message:
feat: ADWIN pattern drift detection for stale rule alerting (wa-1qz1.9)

Implements Bifet & Gavalda 2007 ADWIN algorithm for detecting statistical
shifts in pattern detection rates. Per-rule monitors with configurable
confidence, max window size, and minimum diff thresholds. 32 tests.

Also fixes borrow checker error in error_clustering.rs (other agent's code).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
